language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose the interface language. Applies instantly across the app.
language.label: Display language

theme.title: Theme
theme.desc: Interface and terminal colors change together.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Idle SSH sessions are closed automatically after the selected duration.

terminal.title: Terminal
terminal.desc: Font family and size apply instantly to all open terminal tabs.

sync.title: Sync
sync.desc: Zero-knowledge E2EE cloud sync. Server cannot read your data.
sync.serverRequired: Server URL and access token are required.

updates.title: Updates
updates.desc: Check and install updates from GitHub Releases.
updates.devOnly: Updates are available in packaged builds only.
